name: IBM Certified SOA Associate [2008]
description: Entry-level certification validating the ability to articulate the business and technical value of SOA; bridge technical and business teams; identify SOA entry points and barriers to adoption; and understand the need for SOA governance. Intended for architects, technical sales, administrators, application developers, business analysts, project managers, system integrators, business integrators, managers and project sponsors. Credential code 45000202 (replaced 45000201). Withdrawn May 31st, 2016; expired Sep 30th, 2016.

criteria.narrative: Pass 1 required test (SOA Fundamentals). Recommended skills: familiarity with SOA; basic understanding of Web Services, messaging and related technologies; basic understanding of business requirements.
